title: detach
description: Lifecycle verb: unload the attached model and release resources. Transitions through 'detaching' back to 'initialized'.

Request.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 params for the 'detach' method. No parameters required.

Response.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 result for 'detach'. State status returns to 'initialized' with model_id null.

detached_model_id.description: Content hash of the model that was detached.
